name: BACKSPACE
short_description: BACKSPACE is an adventure/puzzle game where you start your new job as an intern for the space vessel manufacturing company, MVEM! While getting settled in at your new job and meeting the office's odd cast of characters, you may get a sense that something strange is going on...
detailed_description:
BACKSPACE (in all caps for some reason) is an adventure/puzzle game where you start your new job as an intern for the space vessel manufacturing company, MVEM! While getting settled in at your new job and meeting the office's odd cast of characters, you may get a sense that something strange is going on...

Explore and solve puzzles!

Wander the lovely landscapes of corporate mundanity, collecting items to add to your arsenal of puzzle solving tools! Perhaps even find the optional collectibles???

Listen to the wonderful original soundtrack!

BACKSPACE has an original soundtrack entirely composed by yours truly! I sure hope it's as good as I think it is.

Experience the comedic story of company conspiracy!

Team up with your co-workers to figure out and put a stop to whatever shady practices the company is up to! BACKSPACE has a wonderful little story with a bunch of moments that I, at the very least, find quite funny. I suppose you can be the judge of my comedic abilities.

This company is definitely up to no good, man.
